title: Payload to Debug

posts.author: jchamizo (Julio Chamizo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community, im new to monday api, i’ve connected a webhook from Google Apps Script, now i’m wondering how can i see the Payload when i trigger an event in Monday? That payload is super useful to understand if im handling correctly the events. Thing is in post-man all the triggers i send are working, but when im testing them in monday, something is failing. Understanding the payload object i can find the answer.

thanks.
